title: Pixelmon Spawn Alerts
description: A Pixelmon Reforged addon which adds customizable spawn alerts for when Pokémon spawn.
body:
Currently the mod does one simple thing: When a shiny Pokémon spawns around the player a sound effect will play, much like the system on Pixelmon Generations, or originally Pokémon Legends: Arceus.
Required on both the client (the sound effect), and the server (playing the sound effect).

This mod is still in very early stages of development.
